description_long: This radiator features a tall, rectangular form with a series of evenly spaced, vertical black metal tubes mounted on a flat, light-colored back panel. The tubes are arranged in parallel, creating a modern and minimalist appearance, and are likely designed for efficient heat dissipation. The radiator is relatively slim in profile, projecting only a short distance from the wall, making it suitable for narrow spaces. At the bottom, a small connection or valve is visible, suggesting the point for water or heating fluid entry. The overall construction appears robust, with the metal tubes securely attached to the back panel. The design is functional yet stylish, fitting well in contemporary urban interiors or public spaces.
description: A tall, slim radiator with vertical black metal tubes mounted on a light back panel, featuring a modern and minimalist design. The radiator is wall-mounted and includes a visible connection point at the bottom.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full array of vertical black tubes and the light back panel, with a visible connection at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile and the protrusion of the tubes from the back panel.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, light-colored back panel with no visible tubes or connections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the slimness and the outward projection of the tubes.
attribute_pipe_connections: single connection at bottom center, downward orientation
